trim.name: Taglia audio
trim.description: Tagliare e accorciare file audio alla lunghezza desiderata.
trim.metaTitle: Taglia audio - Taglia file audio gratis online
trim.metaDescription: Tagliare e accorciare file audio a qualsiasi lunghezza. Impostare punti di inizio e fine precisi. Strumento gratuito online.
trim.keywords: taglia audio, ritaglia audio, taglia MP3, cutter audio online
trim.unsupported: Questo strumento richiede il supporto di SharedArrayBuffer. Usa un browser moderno con HTTPS.

faq.a1: La maggior parte dei formati, tra cui MP3, WAV, OGG, AAC, FLAC e M4A, sono supportati.
faq.a2: Sì, lo strumento usa la modalità di copia del flusso per preservare la qualità originale senza ricodifica.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device. You can verify this by opening DevTools (F12) and checking the Network tab — zero upload requests.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.

faq.q1: Da quali formati video posso estrarre l'audio?
faq.a1: La maggior parte dei formati video, tra cui MP4, WebM, MOV e AVI, sono supportati.
faq.q2: In quali formati audio posso esportare?
faq.a2: Puoi esportare in formato MP3, WAV o AAC.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device. You can verify this by opening DevTools (F12) and checking the Network tab — zero upload requests.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.
